title: Per-Origin Politeness, Concurrency, Retry Classification, and Adaptive Rate · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed crawl review reconstructs per-origin politeness, concurrency, retry classification, and adaptive rate from authorization, revision, seed, URL key, response identity, robots decision, parse record, extraction provenance, frontier event, report row, failure, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for per-origin politeness and retry controller after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal de…
objectives: Schedule requests by effective origin with minimum start spacing, stable crawler identity, robots and owner policy, and monotonic time.
Limit active work per origin and globally while accounting for redirects, browser resources, retries, and queued fairness.
Retry only transient, safe, replayable failures under an attempt and elapsed-time budget and stop on denial or policy signals.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

stimulus.title: Adaptive Rate Evidence case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review site-quality team handles case 1228 during an authorized nonprofit content audit. Build deterministic Python evidence to validate per-origin spacing, concurrency, transient retry, Retry-After, jitter, and adaptive rate evidence; all network and parser work must remain below explicit budgets; then change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Adjust rate from measured latency, errors, owner constraints, and target concurrency without turning transient fast responses into bursts.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Lower latency always justifies a faster crawl rate.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Adjust rate from measured latency, errors, owner constraints, and target concurrency without turning transient fast responses into bursts. Artifact under review: per-origin politeness and retry controller.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Adaptive Rate Evidence, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

For separate evidence from confidence, crawl one convenient page, omit owner authorization, revision, URL and robots policy, response budgets, parser and selector limits, provenance, frontier and concurrency evidence, changed fixtures, privacy, security, accessibility, stop, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as crawler proof.

steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Authorized crawling and Python Record what required effort · Review Adaptive Rate Evidence, keep Adaptive Rate Evidence connected to executable Python authorization, URL, response, parse, provenance, frontier, report, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Adjust rate from measured latency, errors, owner constraints, and target concurrency without turning transient fast responses into bursts.
